name: Minbos Resources Limited
summary: Minbos Resources Limited, an exploration and development company, focuses on the minerals projects in Madagascar and the Republic of Angola. It holds interests in the Cabinda phosphate project located in the Cabinda Province, the Republic of Angola; and the Ambato rare earth project that consists of two permits and seven prospects covering an area of 440 square kilometers situated in the Ambatofinandrahana Municipal area of the South-Central Highlands, Madagascar. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
